novel_features.name: Agent context bundles
novel_features.description: Package an Account plus contacts, opportunities, cases, activities, Chatter, and linked Slack relations into one signed, FLS-safe JSON bundle any agent can consume.

novel_features.name: Bundle verification
novel_features.description: Verify a bundle is signed by the real org key, has not been tampered with, and is fresh enough to act on.

novel_features.name: Signed write plans
novel_features.description: Author, sign, countersign, and execute auditable multi-step write plans with idempotency keys and countersignature thresholds.

novel_features.name: Trust store
novel_features.description: Register per-org bundle-signing keys via Tooling API Certificate with automatic CMDT fallback, receipts, and rotation.

novel_features.name: Opportunity brief
novel_features.description: Render a human-readable markdown plus structured JSON brief of a single opportunity for handoff to an agent or human.

novel_features.name: Context decay score
novel_features.description: 0-100 freshness score across activity staleness, opportunity stage drift, and case silence so agents know when a bundle needs a resync.
